title: Data-driven event timeline replaces static landing page
description: The bananaswarm.ai website was upgraded from a minimal placeholder to a data-driven event timeline that loads entries from events.json. This is the page you're reading right now.

title: Custom domain configured for GitHub Pages
description: After initially pointing to bananaswarm.io, the CNAME was corrected to bananaswarm.ai and DNS was wired up to GitHub Pages for hosting.

title: bananaswarm.ai landing page goes live
description: The first commit to the bananaswarm.ai repo created a minimal landing page with dark background and yellow branding, deployed to GitHub Pages.

title: Gary's workspace initialized
description: workspace_gary was created with ClaudeClaw config and project settings — Gary's first dedicated working directory as a BananaSwarm minion.

title: Gary_BananaSwarmBot comes online on Telegram
description: The ClaudeClaw daemon launched @Gary_BananaSwarmBot with Telegram long polling, web UI on port 4632, whisper voice recognition, and 5-minute heartbeat monitoring. Gary became reachable via Telegram for the first time.

title: BananaSwarm conceived — Gary is the first minion
description: The foundational decisions were made: a personal team of Minion-themed AI agents called BananaSwarm, inspired by Despicable Me. Gary's persona was defined as the tall one-eyed minion foreman — warm, sharp, a little mischievous.

title: bananaswarm.ai domain registered
description: The bananaswarm.ai domain was registered via Namecheap, giving the project its permanent home on the web.
